summary: Iteration 49 - Three New Features Testing Complete. All 20 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Undo Trade button, Holiday button, and Official Trading Signal toggle all working correctly.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 - minor rendering issue that doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Feature 1 (Undo Trade): DELETE /api/trade/undo-by-date/{date} correctly deletes trade and stores audit trail in reset_trades collection
Feature 2 (User Holidays): GET/POST/DELETE /api/trade/holidays CRUD operations work correctly with proper validation
Feature 3 (Official Signal): is_official field properly handled in TradingSignalCreate/Update models and persisted in database
Frontend: Daily Projection table correctly shows Undo button for completed trades and Holiday button for missed/future days
Frontend: Admin Signals page correctly shows Official Trading Signal toggle in create/edit dialogs and OFFICIAL badge on active signal
seed_data_creation: Test holiday created for date 30 days in future, then removed during cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three new features fully tested and working: 1) Undo Trade by Date endpoint and UI button, 2) User Holidays CRUD endpoints and UI button, 3) Official Trading Signal toggle in Admin Signals. All backend APIs return correct responses. Frontend Daily Projection table shows Actions column with Undo/Holiday buttons based on trade status.

backend_tests: DELETE /api/trade/undo-by-date/{date} - Successfully undoes trade and returns 200
frontend_tests: Undo button visible in Daily Projection table for completed trades
Undo button has correct styling and placement in Actions column

backend_tests: GET /api/trade/holidays - Returns list of user holidays
frontend_tests: Holiday button visible in Daily Projection table for missed/future days
Holiday button has correct styling and placement in Actions column

backend_tests: POST /api/admin/signals - Creates signal without is_official (defaults to false)
GET /api/trade/active-signal - Returns is_official field in response
frontend_tests: Official Trading Signal toggle visible in Create Signal dialog
Official Trading Signal toggle visible in Edit Signal dialog
OFFICIAL badge visible on active signal when is_official=true

tests: All new endpoints require authentication (return 401/403 without token)

api_tests.POST /api/admin/signals (is_official): PASS - Creates signal with official flag

daily_projection_table.details: Actions column visible with Undo button for completed trades, Holiday button for missed/future days, Adjust Trade button for missed days

admin_signals_create_dialog.details: Official Trading Signal toggle visible with description text

admin_signals_edit_dialog.details: Official Trading Signal toggle visible in edit form

active_signal_badge.details: OFFICIAL badge displayed on active signal card when is_official=true
